prompt:
Ultra-realistic low-angle street photography of a young man standing confidently in the middle of a modern city, surrounded by tall symmetrical high-rise apartment buildings forming a geometric frame around the sky. Shot from ground level looking upward (worm’s-eye view), creating a powerful and dominant perspective.

The subject is a stylish young man with short curly hair and light facial hair, wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses, a plain black oversized t-shirt, beige cargo pants with subtle camo patches, and carrying a transparent water bottle in one hand. Black headphones rest around his neck, and a backpack strap is visible on his shoulders.

Expression calm and slightly serious, looking directly into the camera.

Background: bright blue sky with scattered soft clouds, buildings converging inward creating strong leading lines and symmetry. Urban residential towers with repeating windows and light concrete tones.

Lighting: natural daylight, crisp shadows, high contrast, sharp details, HDR look.

Composition: centered subject, vertical framing, strong perspective distortion from wide-angle lens (24mm or wider), cinematic depth.

Style: fashion editorial meets urban realism, ultra-detailed, 8k, sharp focus, realistic skin texture, high dynamic range.
